description_long: This is a classic, retro-style van with a two-tone paint job, featuring a blue lower body and a white roof. The van has a boxy, elongated shape with rounded edges and large windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front end is characterized by a wide windshield, circular headlights, and a simple grille, while the rear features rectangular taillights and a license plate. The wheels are small and set close to the corners, giving the van a stable stance. Chrome accents are visible on the bumpers and around the windows, adding to its vintage appeal. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet iconic vehicle, often associated with urban and suburban environments.
description: A vintage blue and white van with large side windows, chrome accents, and a boxy, elongated shape. It features a classic design with rounded edges and a utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, circular headlights, and blue front panel with chrome details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long row of windows, blue body, and white roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular taillights, license plate, and rear doors.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the windows, blue body, and white roof.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
